## Safety Checklist

- [ ] I distinguished planned capability from implemented capability.
- [ ] I did not add secrets, credentials, personal data, or live trading configuration.
- [ ] I updated related documentation and traceability.
- [ ] I considered authentication, authorization, privacy, data, model, risk, and operational impact.
- [ ] I did not add unsupported performance or return claims.
